skill_line: Skill: Short I, HFW: to, do
directions: Read the words and write the sentence about the picture. Remember to start with a capital letter and end with punctuation.

rows.answer_sentence: Tim the kid hid the big fig.
rows.image_brief: A smiling boy crouching beside a leafy bush while holding or hiding a large fig.

rows.answer_sentence: Did the pig do a big jig?
rows.image_brief: A happy pig dancing upright with simple musical notes around it.
